title: Port Enumeration
description: Port enumeration cheat sheet for pentesting: FTP, SSH, SMB, LDAP, RDP, MySQL, Redis and more.

title: PNETLab on GCP (Terraform-Based Deployment)
description: Cloud-hosted private network lab built using Terraform. Used for learning routing, switching, VPNs, and network design.
features: Secure lab access via Tailscale with custom domain without public exposure

title: Network Scanning
description: Host discovery and port scanning with Nmap, Masscan and Fscan. Covers TCP/UDP scanning, stealth scans, service and version detection, NSE scripts and output formats for reporting.

title: AD Attack Paths
description: Kerberoasting, AS-REP Roasting, Pass-the-Hash and lateral movement techniques across Active Directory environments. Covers BloodHound enumeration and attack path analysis.

title: XSS Attack Vectors
description: Reflected, stored and DOM-based XSS with WAF bypass techniques and payload obfuscation strategies. Includes CSP bypass methods and real-world exploitation scenarios.

title: Linux PrivEsc
description: SUID binaries, cron jobs, sudo misconfigs and PATH hijacking. Automated enumeration with LinPEAS and manual techniques for privilege escalation on Linux systems.

title: Buffer Overflow Basics
description: Stack overflows, ret2libc, ROP chains and ASLR bypass for CTF and real-world scenarios. Includes GDB and pwndbg setup, pattern generation and exploit development workflow.

title: Web Fuzzing 101
description: Directory brute force, parameter fuzzing and endpoint discovery with ffuf, feroxbuster and gobuster. Covers wordlist selection, rate limiting and filtering techniques.

title: Kerberos Attacks
description: Golden ticket, silver ticket, pass-the-ticket and ASREPRoast techniques in Active Directory. Practical guide using Impacket, Rubeus and Mimikatz.

title: SQL Injection Deep Dive
description: Union-based, blind, time-based and out-of-band SQL injection. Automation with SQLMap and manual exploitation techniques for different database engines.

title: Python for Red Teams
description: Asyncio port scanners, reverse shells, keyloggers and C2 stubs in Python 3. Practical scripts for offensive security operations and CTF automation.

title: SMB Enumeration
description: Null sessions, share enumeration, relay attacks and Impacket tooling for SMB. Covers SMBv1/v2 quirks, NTLM relay and credential capture techniques.

title: SSRF Attack Patterns
description: Cloud metadata endpoints, SSRF to RCE chains and bypassing common SSRF filters. Includes AWS, GCP and Azure metadata exploitation and blind SSRF detection.

title: HTB: Escape
description: HackTheBox Escape walkthrough covering MSSQL service accounts, SeImpersonatePrivilege abuse and Active Directory Certificate Services exploitation.
